body:
If you're looking for a **custom-fabricated** garage door (rather than an off-the-shelf replacement), these are some of the stronger options serving Pleasanton:

  1. **The Door Doctor** (Pleasanton)

 * Installs premium garage doors from manufacturers including custom wood and carriage-house styles.

 * Good choice if you want help designing and installing a custom door, even if the door itself is built by a specialty manufacturer. [HOME | The Door Doctor](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  2. **Right Way Garage Doors**

 * Offers **handcrafted custom wood garage doors** and advertises a "you design, we build" service for custom projects in Pleasanton. They also provide in-home design consultations. [Pleasanton, CA's Garage Door Experts Since 1980](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/pleasanton/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Company in Pleasanton, CA - Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/garage-door-company-in-pleasanton-ca/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  3. **Gar-Cal Garage Doors Division** (Pleasanton)

 * Provides new garage door installation and can handle more complex installation projects. If you're after a unique design, it's worth asking whether they fabricate in-house or source through custom manufacturers. [Gar-Cal Garage Doors Division](https://www.garcalgaragedoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[About — Gar-Cal Garage Doors Division](https://www.garcalgaragedoors.com/about?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  4. **Graham Garage Doors**

 * Offers custom wood garage doors and an online design/builder tool for creating a personalized door before installation. [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA | Graham Garage Doors](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  5. **Eppler Garage Doors** (Livermore)

 * Nearby and well-regarded. They work with a variety of manufacturers and can often source custom-built residential doors. It's a good option if you're open to companies just outside Pleasanton.

If you mean **truly custom fabrication** —for example:

  * oversized or non-standard openings,

  * one-of-a-kind woodwork,

  * steel, aluminum, or glass architectural doors,

  * matching an existing historic home,

then **Right Way Garage Doors** would probably be my first call because they explicitly advertise custom design-and-build services, followed by **The Door Doctor** , which can coordinate specialty manufacturers and installation. [Pleasanton, CA's Garage Door Experts Since 1980](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/pleasanton/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Company in Pleasanton, CA - Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/garage-door-company-in-pleasanton-ca/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[HOME | The Door Doctor](https://www.thedoordoctors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you can tell me:

  * the **material** (wood, steel, aluminum, glass),

  * the **style** (modern, carriage-house, mid-century, etc.), and

  * the **approximate dimensions** ,

I can narrow it down to the companies most likely to fabricate exactly what you need.  

Give feedback
